timeline.title: Editor & CEO
timeline.description: Leading editorial strategy and managing daily operations of one of Bangladesh's leading news channels.

timeline.title: Special Correspondent
timeline.description: Covered major international events and political developments in South Asia and Europe.

timeline.title: Senior Correspondent
timeline.description: Investigative reporting on human rights issues and political corruption.

timeline.title: Senior Reporter
timeline.description: Covered national politics, human interest stories, and investigative pieces.

timeline.title: Staff Reporter
timeline.description: Began journalism career covering local news and community events.
